escalation.rationale: Multiple active conflicts with US-Israel attacks on Iran killing over 3,400, ceasefire collapsing, and Iran threatening to close additional shipping straits.

ticker_items: Trump cursed at Netanyahu over Lebanon escalation in phone call
Iran threatens to close Bab el-Mandeb strait, oil prices surge
Ukraine continues seizing Russian territory amid economic crisis
US-Israel ceasefire with Iran reportedly collapsing
Russian drone strikes civilians in Romania

eastern_europe.description: Massive coordinated missile and drone barrage targeting civilian and infrastructure areas
Russian drone struck residential building injuring civilians and violating NATO airspace.
Massive Russian missile and drone barrage targeted civilian infrastructure causing deaths and destruction.

middle_east.description: Two missiles fired from Lebanon toward Israeli territory
Israeli strikes continue in Lebanon despite reported ceasefire agreements.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

middle_east.text: What the fuck are you doing?
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Finland seized nearly €4 million in Russian assets to compensate Ukrainian energy firm for destruction of property. The National Enforcement Authority took action to directly support Ukrainian compensation claims.

Trump expressing frustration with Netanyahu while pursuing Iran negotiations and Lebanon ceasefire. Reports suggest US considering expanding nuclear sharing framework to Eastern European NATO allies amid rising tensions.

Turkish Foreign Minister spoke on rejecting 'strategic resignation' amid global disorder. Turkey continues balancing between NATO obligations and regional relationships while seeking alternative connectivity routes to Strait of Hormuz.

France showing panic over Israel's deepening incursion into Lebanon according to reports. French concerns reflect European compulsion to rescue failing actors from consequences of their aggression when Israel is involved.
Spain defending its rejection of Trump's 'law of the jungle' approach to foreign policy. Foreign Minister says Spain sticking to internationalist principles while others forget theirs.

financial.notes: Oil prices expected to double as Iran threatens closure of Bab el-Mandeb strait following Strait of Hormuz closure.

update_log.text: Iran reviewing proposed Trump deal to halt war as Lebanon attacks continue
Trump cursed at Netanyahu during phone call over Lebanon escalation according to multiple sources
Iran threatens to close Bab el-Mandeb strait as new front in conflict with US-Israel
Russian drone strikes residential building in Romania injuring civilians
Iran threatens to close Bab el-Mandeb Strait as US-Iran talks collapse
Lebanon announces partial ceasefire between Hezbollah and Israel
Trump calls Netanyahu following massive Russian strike on Ukraine
Russia launches 656 drones and 73 missiles at Ukraine overnight killing at least 13
